title: Russia-linked APT uses DRILLAPP backdoor to spy on Ukrainian targets

rules.sigma:
title: CDB APEX v37.0 — Russia-linked APT uses DRILLAPP backdoor to spy on Ukrainian
status: experimental
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX
date: 2026/03/21
logsource:
    category: firewall
detection:
    selection_dns:
        query:
            - '*gnome.com*'
            - '*pastefy.app*'
    condition: selection_dns
level: high
